title: Chef Aid 12cm Wide Nylon Mesh Plastic Strainer in White, Ideal for Draining, Straining and Washing Beans, Fruit, Vegatables, Salads and Much More, BPA Free and Dishwasher Safe (Pack of 2)
features: The information below applies to each unit in the pack
DURABLE AND LIGHTWEIGHT: Made from high-quality white plastic nylon mesh, with a grip handle and clips that make this sieve set easy to use in various ways, BPA FREE

FINE MESH: Ideal for straining pasta, rinsing fruits and vegetables, and sifting dry ingredients such as flour. A must-have for any home cook or professional chef looking for versatility and convenience
THE 12CM SIZE: The strainer features a comfortable handle for a secure grip and a hook for easy storage. Its compact size ensures it fits easily into your kitchen drawers or hangs neatly on a hook
EASY TO CLEAN: The smooth plastic construction is easy to clean and dishwasher safe, ensuring hassle-free maintenance and hygiene. No need to worry about rust or difficult-to-remove food particles

AFFORDABLE QUALITY: Chef Aid delivers a high-quality kitchen tool at an affordable price, providing excellent value for money. Perfect for budget-conscious shoppers who don't want to compromise on quality
